Hi, I'm Abdalrahman Midani

Junior Cybersecurity Specialist
& Senior Front-end Developer

Junior Cybersecurity specialist with a focus on Web Security. Experienced in vulnerability analysis, secure web applications, and Linux-based systems. Strong knowledge of the OWASP Top 10 with hands-on experience using security tools.
